title: Return Policy
description: Conditions, methods, timelines, and costs associated with returning physical items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the return policy.

line_item_ids.description: Line items governed by this return policy, allowing distinct policies per item.

return_days.description: Number of days allowed for a return, typically starting from the date of delivery. Required if category is finite_window.

exchanges_allowed.description: Indicates whether the buyer can exchange the item.

methods.description: Permitted physical methods for returning the item, along with their associated fee structures.
